title: # [#hybrid_toggle]

# [#hybrid_toggle]

## |[ HYBRID::T0GGL3_T4BL3 ]|
15 HYBRID TOGGLES — RITUAL THRESHOLD CONDITIONS
_Not binary, not spectral—emotional/mystical conditionals triggered by system, character, narrative, or fusion._

| Toggle ID | Conditioned Pair | Hybrid Mode | Function Description |
|-----------|--------------------------|------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| H01 | veil lifted/lowered | concealment | mystery and knowledge thresholds |
| H02 | mirror intact/shattered | identity | clarity of self or illusion |
| H03 | halo present/flickering | divinity | aura, mythic resonance |
| H04 | channel open/noise | communication | AI link strength or thread clarity |
| H05 | gateway sealed/ajar | access | partial availability or time-windows |
